roadmap_items: Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - harden read-only fallback previews by filtering source CodeBlock entries from unsupported-card fallback views.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - keep contract assertions synchronized with the sanitized fallback preview output.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - preserve safe primitive blocks and JSON previews while omitting source code blocks from fallback views.
scope_goal: Harden fallback previews in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py by excluding source CodeBlock entries from the read-only fallback view and keep the contract assertions aligned with that sanitized output.
tasks_completed: Updated the engine and unknown-card fallback paths in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py to exclude source CodeBlock entries from read-only fallback previews while preserving safe primitive blocks and the synthetic JSON preview.
Added contract coverage in tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py to verify the sanitized fallback preview output omits source code blocks.
Rewrote the lane metadata to match the actual fallback-preview hardening change and its matching assertions.
Kept the lane record scoped to one source file plus matching tests with no routing or provider impact.
vision_capabilities: Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI) - fallback previews now sanitize unsupported-card read-only views by omitting source code blocks while preserving safe primitive content and JSON previews.
Capability 4: Operator-first control surface - fallback consumers can rely on sanitized read-only previews that do not surface source code blocks.
